title: sabulina glandulosa
intro: Sabulina glandulosa, also known as Sea Sandwort, is a low-growing, succulent plant species native to coastal regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sabulina glandulosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sabulina glandulosa typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
